Table	Create Table
livestream_sets	CREATE TABLE `livestream_sets` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `livestreamId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `setName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `setPrice` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `quantitySold` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `totalOriginalPrice` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `discountRate` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `totalRevenue` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdBy` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `sortOrder` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
